raw_consumer_statement: Someone used my authorized users ( XXXX XXXX ) sears XXXXXXXX XXXX card on XXXX for {$930.00} and I cancelled the card and disputed all the transactions as they were not made by XXXX XXXXr she did not even have possession of the XXXX  card and XXXX XXXX XXXX department XXXX me papers of each XXXX of the charges and had me sign each one stating me nor XXXX XXXX made those charges and they credited my account the {$930.00} then XXXX days ago they sent me a letter stating they were reversing their decision and charging my account back the {$930.00} for what reason XXXX dont know they state XXXX XXXX  did make those charges but they have no proof of that and she didnt make them she didnt even have the XXXX  card or the number to do so
